title: Bounded Operations-Web Backend Seam And Hosted Route Validation Execution
objective: Execute the Packet 009-selected bounded host-side validation slice by proving the public control-plane seam and the hosted operations-web routes from the Olares host using only already admitted host-local toolchains and public hosted targets.
dependency_note: Packet 009 selected this slice as the smallest truthful host-executable follow-on after Packet 008. Packet 010 is bounded to public control-plane seam proof and hosted-route smoke only and does not widen into browser-runtime provisioning or broader product delivery.
required_inputs: Published parent-root commit `08839ae08506a55cc0b1d64f19a3e2a984377f28` or later clean parity on `/home/olares/code/apex`
execution_scope: Run `apps/control-plane-api/scripts/smoke_deployed_control_plane.py` against `https://control.apexpowerops.com` with `--skip-authenticated-checks` and `--require-apparatus-study-route` from the Olares host.

Run `apps/operations-web/scripts/smoke-hosted-routes.mjs` against `https://operations.apexpowerops.com` from the Olares host using the already admitted Node runtime directly so the command shape matches the script argument parser.
Record the exact command lines, summarized pass/fail output, and host cleanliness before and after execution.
Keep the host mirror clean and preserve `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` as observe-only evidence.
explicit_no_go_items: broader product delivery reopening by implication
success_criteria: The public control-plane seam smoke ends in `RESULT PASS` against `https://control.apexpowerops.com` with the governed apparatus route required.
The operations-web hosted-route smoke ends in `SMOKE_SUMMARY failed=0` against `https://operations.apexpowerops.com`.
`/home/olares/code/apex` remains clean before and after the slice.
No package, lockfile, runtime, service, or old-clone mutation occurs.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes only bounded host-side validation commands and no database writes, source edits, package mutation, lockfile mutation, runtime mutation, service mutation, remote rewrite, rollback, force, reset, or clean.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-05 from `/home/olares/code/apex/apex-power-ops-platform` as the bounded host-side validation slice selected by Packet 009. The public control-plane seam smoke against `https://control.apexpowerops.com` ended in `RESULT PASS`, the `operations-web` hosted-route smoke against `https://operations.apexpowerops.com` ended in `SMOKE_SUMMARY failed=0 passed=8`, `/home/olares/code/apex` remained clean before and after execution, and `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` remained observe-only with status count 30. Packet 010 did not open Playwright browser runtime provisioning, host-local VS Code desktop installation, broader product delivery reopening by implication, package or lockfile mutation, runtime or service mutation, public ingress widening, AI-services expansion, Gitea or canonical-hosting transition, remote rewrite, rollback, force, reset, clean, or old-clone mutation.
next_action: Execute `Olares Dev Residency 011 - Post-010 Operations Visibility Lane Reopening Decision` as the next bounded decision surface before the first new Operations Visibility planning packet is opened.
